name: house-prices-global
title: Residential property price statistics from different countries
description: Residential property price statistics for 60+ countries and regions at quarterly frequency, published by the Bank for International Settlements (BIS). Covers nominal and real price index levels (base year 2010 = 100) and year-on-year percentage changes. Real series are the nominal price series deflated by the consumer price index. Indicators are selected from the detailed BIS dataset to facilitate access and enhance comparability.

licenses.name: BIS-terms
licenses.title: BIS Terms of Permitted Use of Statistics (Attribution Required)

resources.name: nominal-index
resources.description: Nominal residential property price index for selected countries and regions at quarterly frequency, base year 2010 = 100.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Last day of the reference quarter in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). For example, 2023-09-30 represents Q3 2023.

fields.name: country_code
fields.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code or BIS regional aggregate code (e.g. XM = Euro area, XW = World, 4T = Emerging market economies, 5R = Advanced economies).

fields.name: country
fields.description: Full name of the country or regional aggregate.

fields.name: price
fields.description: Nominal residential property price index value (base year 2010 = 100). Empty for periods where no data is available.

resources.name: nominal-year
resources.description: Nominal residential property price year-on-year percentage changes for selected countries and regions at quarterly frequency.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Last day of the reference quarter in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). For example, 2023-09-30 represents Q3 2023.

fields.name: country_code
fields.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code or BIS regional aggregate code (e.g. XM = Euro area, XW = World, 4T = Emerging market economies, 5R = Advanced economies).

fields.name: country
fields.description: Full name of the country or regional aggregate.

fields.name: price
fields.description: Nominal residential property price year-on-year change, in per cent. Empty for periods where no data is available.

fields.name: price
